title: Nirvana Cleanser
content:
After comprehension of one's law reaches a certain extent they will be able to breakthrough. In this realm, one will be able to control natural law. They are also able to open a space that functions like a bag of holding but is locked by the cultivator instead of able to be robbed like normal bags.

In addition to controlling laws, the other ability Nirvana Cleanser cultivators had was to extract origin energy from the world. With the ability to extract origin energy from the world, they didn’t have to be afraid of wasting origin energy and could use spells at any time, this effectively makes them eternal because they can constantly borrow power from heaven and earth.

Stages
[
]

Early

Middle

Late

Peak

Trivia
[
]

Early on it was stated that Cultivators who fail to reach Nirvana Shatterer will eventually still face a calamity akin to the Five Heavens Blights in this stage, due to their functional immortality. Their punishment however will be "far harsher" and they most likely will not survive. This concept was then never mentioned again.
